title: A Message from the President & CEO
summary: Spring 2022 Dear Shareholders, Alongside many shareholders and friends, many of us still grieve the loss of our Board Chairman Henry Ivanoff Sr. Henry was the longest-serving board member and Chair in BSNC’s history. He experienced the downturns in our financial history, leading the Board and staff through difficult times. He didn’t let financia...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 19, 2022
summary: May 19, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a slightly higher rate of 2.35% from the level on 05/12/2022 of 13.090 M km 2 to 12.782 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laboratory Data Source: N...
